case_title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. EMMAJANE HUNT ET AL

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HUNT, EMMAJANE AN INDIVIUAL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HUNT, EMMAJANE AN INDIVIUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. SERVED DEC-06-2018, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNT, EMMAJANE AN INDIVIUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 KEARNY STREET, UNIT NUMBER 64, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
